testcase.name: addAddress_clearsOldDefault_whenNewIsDefault
testcase.system-out: 23:25:30.864 [main] INFO com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Added address id=null for keycloakId=kc-user-123

testcase.name: addAddress_success
testcase.system-out: 23:25:31.145 [main] INFO com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Added address id=10 for keycloakId=kc-user-123

testcase.name: deleteAddress_success
testcase.system-out: 23:25:31.175 [main] INFO com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Deleted address id=5 for keycloakId=kc-user-123

testcase.name: createProfileFromEvent_alreadyExists_skips
testcase.system-out: 23:25:31.203 [main] WARN com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Profile already exists for keycloakId=kc-user-123. Skipping.

testcase.name: updateAddress_success
testcase.system-out: 23:25:31.225 [main] INFO com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Updated address id=5 for keycloakId=kc-user-123

testcase.name: createProfileFromEvent_success
testcase.system-out: 23:25:31.233 [main] INFO com.ecommerce.userservice.service.UserProfileService -- Created profile for keycloakId=kc-new-user, email=jane@example.com
